prompt: Write the opening paragraph of a children's book about a shy octopus who wants to make friends.
response: Ollie the octopus lived in a cozy coral cave, but he wasn't always happy. You see, Ollie was terribly shy. He had eight long, wiggly arms that he usually kept tucked close to his body, and big, googly eyes that he often hid behind a clump of swaying seaweed. More than anything, Ollie wished he had friends to play hide-and-seek with in the kelp forest, but the thought of actually talking to the other sea creatures made his tentacles tremble!
